title: Reducing Dishes
hints: Does the order in which you cook the selected dishes matter for the total score? Try sorting the satisfaction array to simplify the decision of which dishes to keep.
Consider processing the sorted dishes from highest satisfaction to lowest. How does adding a new dish at the beginning of the cooking sequence affect the total score?

Prepending a dish pushes every dish already chosen one slot later, so each of them contributes its value one extra time. That means the marginal gain of adding one more dish at the front is exactly the total of everything chosen so far including it — reasoning about that marginal gain, instead of testing subsets, tells you when including more stops being worthwhile.
